title: Create a purple cube button that disables after 4 taps (Flutter)

input.description:
# Task Metadata: task 6

## Task ID
task 6

## Action
Create a purple cube button that disables after 4 taps (Flutter)

## Stack
Flutter

## Skip Flags
- Skip Designer: True
- Skip Developer: False
- Skip Tester: False

## Max QA Retries
3 (default)

## Pipeline
Architect → Developer → Tester (Designer skipped)

## Summary
Create `test/white_cube_button.dart` with `PurpleCubeButton` StatefulWidget. 80×80 purple square showing tap count as centered white text. After 4 taps: turns grey and ignores further taps.

## Key Files
- **Create**: `test/white_cube_button.dart`
- **Reference**: `test/purple_cube_button.dart` (task 5 — same pattern, threshold 3→4)
